backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the restaurant backend with menu item CRUD, user profile management, payment QR code storage, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three features (menu error handling, payment QR error handling, global error boundary) to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing component responsibilities and recent changes across the app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the PUNJABI BITES app that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with four routes (/, /admin, /payment, /receipt), wraps the app in CartProvider and ErrorBoundary, and includes a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied UI shown to unauthenticated or non-admin users, offering a login button (with loading state) and a link back to the menu.
frontend/src/components/CartSidebar.tsx: Sliding cart sidebar with item quantity controls, a floating cart button with badge, and a checkout button that navigates to /payment via TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class component that catches runtime errors and displays a branded error screen with the error message and a reload button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing the Punjabi Bites brand name, copyright year, and a referral link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with the Punjabi Bites logo, an admin panel link shown only to confirmed admins, and a login/logout button using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wrapper layout component that composes Header, a flex-growing main content area, and Footer into a full-height page structure.
frontend/src/components/MenuItemCard.tsx: Card component displaying a menu item's name, category emoji, price, description, availability badge, and an add-to-cart button with quantity tracking.
frontend/src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx: Form component for creating or editing a menu item, using react-hook-form with fields for name, description, price, category, and image URL, wired to add/update mutations.
frontend/src/components/PaymentQRCodeMan: Admin card component for uploading and previewing a payment QR code image, converting it to base64 and saving it via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/PaymentQRCodeMod: A modal dialog that displays a payment QR code fetched from the backend, optionally showing an order summary with item breakdown and total before the QR code image.
frontend/src/components/PresetImagePicke: Intentionally empty placeholder file not used in Version 2 of the application.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for shopping cart state management, exposing actions to add, remove, update, and clear cart items along with computed total amount and count.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, initializing it with the user's Internet Identity or anonymously, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login state, identity persistence, and exposing login/logout functions via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching menu items, admin status, and payment QR code, as well as mutations for adding, updating, deleting, and toggling menu items.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines a warm South Asian color palette (saffron, deep red, cream, spice) as CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that allows authenticated admins to manage menu items (add, edit, delete, toggle availability) and manage the payment QR code, with access control guarding the page.
frontend/src/pages/MenuDisplay.tsx: React page that fetches and displays restaurant menu items grouped by category (appetizer, main course, dessert, beverage) with loading skeletons, an error/retry state, admin controls, and a cart sidebar.
frontend/src/pages/OrderReceiptPage.tsx: React page that reads order receipt data from sessionStorage, clears the cart, and renders a styled receipt card showing order number, date/time, itemized list, and total after a successful payment.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: React page that displays a payment QR code fetched from the backend, supports camera-based QR scanning, and generates deep-link options for UPI/payment apps (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM) before navigating to the receipt page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the Punjabi Bites brand color palette (saffron, deepRed, cream, spice), custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), extended shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the Punjabi Bites restaurant app's version, known intermittent menu/payment loading issues, completed fix features (error boundaries, retry logic), and a pending backend audit request for getMenuItems and getPaymentQRCode.
